features.name: automatic logic variable declaration in initial block
features.description: Code should include an `automatic logic` variable declaration inside an `initial begin` block, using the SystemVerilog automatic lifetime qualifier combined with the logic data type

features.name: synthesis guard around register randomization initial block with automatic variable
features.description: Code should include a `ifndef SYNTHESIS` conditional compilation guard wrapping an `initial begin` block that declares an `automatic logic` variable used for register randomization under `ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT`

features.name: register with multiple outputs through shared intermediate wire
features.description: Code should include a register whose value is assigned to an intermediate wire, then that wire continuously drives multiple output ports via separate assign statements
